raw_prompt: Single humanoid knight character concept. Strict side profile. Full body centered in frame on a plain light background. Closed medieval knight helmet with no visible face. Worn steel plate armor with practical layered cloth underneath. One sword and one shield only. Clean readable retro-friendly silhouette for a 2D dark fantasy metroidvania player character. Brown, green, grey, and beige palette with restrained purple accents. Moody but simple presentation.
silhouette_intent: strict orthographic side-profile knight, single full-body figure, clear sword silhouette and clear shield silhouette, standard proportions, fully centered and fully inside frame
